title: Simiae's Resources
description: A Resource Pack for all datapacks that I have made
body:
# Simae's Resources
**Simiae's Resources** is a Resource pack that is required to be used if you are downloading the datapack version of any of my creations. If you have downloaded a `.jar` file (a mod) for any of my datapacks, you do not need to download this resource pack. 

Keep in mind that the textures of **ALL** my datapacks are here.
